app.title: AtlasIP
lang.name: English
analysis.title: IP Analysis
analysis.subtitle: Analyze IP addresses, hostnames, or paste email headers
analysis.placeholder.default: Enter one or more IP addresses (one per line)
analysis.empty: No results yet. Enter IPs above to begin.
analysis.results.title: Results
history.title: History
history.clear.title: Clear history
history.rerun.title: Rerun analysis
settings.title: Settings
settings.hint.autostart: Start AtlasIP automatically when you log in.
settings.hint.dns_resolver: DNS server used to resolve hostnames during lookups.
settings.hint.ip_mode: Address family preference when opening connections.
settings.hint.pooling: Reuse TCP connections across requests to reduce latency.
settings.hint.max_connections: Maximum number of simultaneous open connections (1–100).
settings.hint.keep_alive: Send TCP keep-alive probes to detect stale connections.
settings.hint.retry_strategy: Algorithm used to space out retries after a failed request.
settings.hint.retry_delay: Base delay in milliseconds between retries (0–600000).
settings.hint.appearance: Controls the colour scheme of the application.
settings.hint.language: Controls the display language of the application.
settings.hint.retry_enabled: Automatically retry failed requests without user intervention.
settings.hint.retry_count: Number of additional attempts after the first failure (1–10).
settings.hint.retry_delay_ms: Wait time in milliseconds before each retry attempt (0–600000).
settings.hint.timeout_global: Maximum total time allowed for a full lookup operation.
settings.hint.timeout_request: Maximum time allowed for a single HTTP request.
settings.hint.timeout_dns: Maximum time allowed for a DNS resolution.
settings.hint.timeout_geoip: Maximum time allowed for a GeoIP lookup.
settings.hint.no_proxy: Comma-separated list of hosts to exclude from the proxy.
hdi.phrase.ms: The server will wait up to {n} ms before giving up.
hdi.phrase.seconds: The server will wait up to {n} seconds before giving up.
hdi.phrase.minutes: The server will wait up to {n} minutes before giving up.
about.description: AtlasIP is a cross-platform OSINT tool for analyzing IP addresses, domains, and network infrastructure.
about.features.title: Main Features
about.feature.1: RDAP, DNS, WHOIS and ASN lookups
about.github.label: View project on GitHub
about.credits: Developed by Absol3m and open-source contributors.
about.legal: AtlasIP performs passive OSINT only. No intrusive scanning or active probing is executed.
